notes:
## What's New
- **AI Chat Drag & Drop Fix**: Images dragged from Windows Explorer into AI Chat now properly show preview and can be sent to the AI.
- **Plugin Opener Update**: Improved reliability of opening external links and exported files.
- **Stability Improvements**: Resolved several lint errors and optimized base64 image handling.
- **Auto-Updater Fix**: Filename schema updated to ensure reliable signature verification.
